creator: bar@FreeBSD.org
text:

    net-p2p/amule: fix pkg-plist for AMULEGUI as well.

    While here, update WX from 2.8 to 3.0 because amulegui seems to not always work correctly with 2.8.

    PR:     26002
    Reported by:    echoxxzz@gmail.com
